Author: GitHub
Description:
"The AI is doing the work, and you're supervising." Anders Hejlsberg describes the massive shift happening in software development, where we move from using AI as a typing assistant to an autonomous agent. He explains why future AI tools might not need a traditional IDE and how the Model Context Protocol (MCP) will connect everything.

#AI #AndersHejlsberg #AIAgent

Title: Anders Hejlsberg on the shift from AI assistant to AI agent
